blockingIssues.description: VAL-INSTALL-007 requires both npm and Homebrew distribution paths to produce a working CLI entrypoint, but test/install-matrix.test.ts Homebrew section only parses/regex-checks Formula/mors.rb content (lines 120-196) and never executes a brewed mors command. This can pass even when real Homebrew install/runtime behavior is broken. The install-matrix validation needs an executable Homebrew install+run flow to satisfy the assertion.

appliedUpdates.description: Added .factory/library/homebrew-formula.md documenting the Homebrew audit --except=license caveat for the UNLICENSED formula.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update mors-worker skill scope to include distribution-install-ux milestone, since the skill was successfully used for all 4 features in this milestone despite SKILL.md limiting it to core-foundation and local-cli-flows.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 4 features in distribution-install-ux (distribution-github-npm-install-ready, distribution-setup-shell-command, distribution-homebrew-tap-formula, distribution-install-matrix-and-first-run-flow) used skillName: mors-worker. Flagged by 3/4 reviewers as scope drift.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit guidance in mors-worker skill for validation-only / test-only features where new tests may intentionally pass against existing behavior without source changes, relaxing the strict red/green TDD requirement for these cases.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature distribution-install-matrix-and-first-run-flow created test/install-matrix.test.ts that passed on first run against existing codebase with no production-code iteration. The strict TDD mandate in SKILL.md step 2 doesn't account for this pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add user-testing guidance for validating installed mors entrypoints from npm global and Homebrew paths, not just local 'node dist/index.js' execution.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: .factory/library/user-testing.md prescribes 'MORS_CONFIG_DIR=... node dist/index.js <command>' for all CLI testing. No guidance exists for verifying installed binary entrypoints, which is essential for distribution-install-ux validation assertions (VAL-INSTALL-001, VAL-INSTALL-006, VAL-INSTALL-007).

rejectedObservations.observation: Shared CLI user-testing guidance has not been updated to include the new setup-shell command/testing hook used in install UX validation.
rejectedObservations.reason: Redundant with the broader user-testing guidance suggestion already captured above; setup-shell is adequately covered by its own test suite and the user-testing validator will handle it separately.
